headings.text: Our Free Planning Session Can Help You Take Control Of Your Retirement & Financial Life.
When people are looking to hire us, a few common things we hear are…

"You all do such a great job for us.
I've finally transformed into the guy who doesn't worry about his money anymore."

"It is so nice to be a client of yours.
You folks have made my transition to retirement so easy and with so much financial confidence."

"We are just so impressed with Streamline and the service we are getting.
We trust you completely and we love getting to be part of a family."
Want to see if a free planning session is right for you?

THINKING ABOUT YOUR RETIREMENT?
Our Free Planning Session Can Help You Take Control Of Your Retirement & Financial Life.
GET STARTED
“At all times when providing Financial Advice to a Client, a CFP® professional must act as a fiduciary, and therefore, act in the best interests of the Client.”
~ CFP Board
What Our Clients Say
"You all do such a great job for us.
I've finally transformed into the guy who doesn't worry about his money anymore."
—David L. (Client)
"It is so nice to be a client of yours.
You folks have made my transition to retirement so easy and with so much financial confidence."
—Mike and Ann Martin (Client)
"We are just so impressed with Streamline and the service we are getting.
We trust you completely and we love getting to be part of a family."
—Matt L. (Client)
Streamline Financial has not provided any compensation for the testimonials shown. The testimonials shown have been selected from among all client feedback. To our knowledge, no other conflicts of interest exist regarding these testimonials.
LEADERSHIP TEAM
Dave Zoller, CFP®
Managing Partner, President
With 16 years of experience helping people prepare for retirement, Dave now focuses on Streamline Financial’s future growth while teaching thousands of people through the Firm's YouTube channel and speaking engagements. His work ensures the team not only manages wealth but also helps clients pursue fulfillment and purpose in retirement.
Tim Meisenheimer, CFP®, CFA
Managing Partner, CEO
Tim has been helping families for over 16 years leverage their wealth to change the world. He leads Streamline’s long-term strategy, organizational health, and client experience. Tim focuses on aligning Streamline’s mission, people, and processes to help both clients and the team to live with greater clarity, purpose, and generosity.
Luke Hofsommer, CFP®, CFA
Partner, Director of Operations
Luke Hofsommer is a CFP® and CFA charterholder who’s been helping clients plan their future for almost a decade. He is passionate about helping people make good financial decisions that they will be proud of in the future.
Sean Ford, CFP®, CFA, RICP®
Partner, Director of Wealth Management
Sean is a Certified Financial Planner (CFP®), Chartered Financial Analyst (CFA), and Retirement Income Certified Professional (RICP®) who’s excited by serving our clients and helping reduce the anxiety that comes with making major money decisions.
WEALTH ADVISOR TEAM
Matt Fuhrman, CFP®, EA
Wealth Advisor
Matt is a CFP® with a background in tax and accounting. He has helped clients optimize the financial and non-financial aspects of their lives for over 7 years through wise management of their resources. His favorite part of working with people is helping to remove their burdens by coming alongside them as their partner and advocate.
Eli Pinkevich, CFP®
Wealth Advisor
Elijah Pinkevich is a CFP® with a background in finance and experience supporting comprehensive financial strategies and tax optimization. A graduate of UIUC with a degree in Finance, he is passionate about building strong client relationships and helping individuals align their personal goals with sound financial decision-making.
Rudy Litavsky, CFP®
Wealth Advisor
Rudy is a Certified Financial Planner (CFP®) with over five years of experience in finance, beginning his career with an investment firm before transitioning to financial planning. He is passionate about helping clients find peace with their finances and confidence in their future by alleviating the stress and fear that financial decisions can bring.
CLIENT SERVICE TEAM
Caitlyn Karl, CRPC®
Team Administrator
Caitlyn is Series 7 & 66 registered and has years of experience caring for clients in the Wealth Management industry. She welcomes new clients into our Streamline Family and walks alongside them while making the transfer process as seamless as possible.
Carolyn Rausch, FPQP®
Client Service Specialist
The amount of paperwork that’s needed in the financial industry can sometimes be overwhelming for our clients. Carolyn’s here to make it as easy as possible for you so that you can save your time for things you actually enjoy doing. She’ll also help you with any account-related questions that come up.
Jill Beales
Client Service Associate
Our favorite part of our jobs? When we get a chance to connect and meet with our clients! Jill is your go-to for getting a meeting on the calendar. She's also here to help with account-related needs you may have.
Bill Holbrook
Executive Coach
Bill has over 15 years of experience leading teams and individuals to achieve remarkable results. He conducts workshops and trainings across the U.S. for both for-profit and non-profit sectors. He specializes in executive leadership, team building, employee engagement, and tools like Gallup StrengthsFinder, Emotional Intelligence, and Myers-Briggs. As a coach, he helps clients create transformative changes in their lives and organizations.

DISCLOSURES
Securities offered through LaSalle St. Securities LLC (LSS), member FINRA/SIPC. Advisory services offered through LaSalle St. Investment Advisors LLC (LSIA), a Registered Investment Advisor. Streamline Financial Services is not affiliated with LSS or LSIA. LSS is affiliated with LSIA.
Licensed for securities in AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, DE, FL, GA, IA, IL, IN, KS, MD, ME, MI, MN, MT, NC, NV, NY, OH, OR, SC, TN, TX, VA, WI, WY
Licensed for insurance in AR, AZ, CA, CO, FL, IL, IN, MD, MN, NC, OH, SC, TN, TX, WI, WY.
